inputs.label: Initial Payment (P)
inputs.businessContext: The payment amount at the end of the first period.

businessContext_i18n.en: The payment amount at the end of the first period.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zahlungsbetrag am Ende der ersten Periode.

inputs.label: Growth Rate (g)
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which the payment grows each period. Enter as decimal (e.g., 0.03 for 3%).

businessContext_i18n.en: The rate at which the payment grows each period. Enter as decimal (e.g., 0.03 for 3%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ödemenin her dönem büyüdüğü oran. Ondalık olarak girin (örneğin, %3 için 0,03).
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Rate, mit der die Zahlung pro Periode wächst. Als Dezimalzahl eingeben (z. B. 0,03 für 3 %).

inputs.label: Discount Rate (r)
inputs.businessContext: The interest rate per period used for discounting. Enter as decimal.

businessContext_i18n.en: The interest rate per period used for discounting. Enter as decimal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İskonto için kullanılan dönem başına faiz oranı. Ondalık olarak girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Zinssatz pro Periode, der für die Abzinsung verwendet wird. Als Dezimalzahl eingeben.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
